chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-924 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection No.12 and reply of counsel at ‘A’ and ‘B’ 2. For orders on MA No.6629/2023 (Exemption Application) 3. For orders on MA No.6630/2023 4. For hearing of main case 10.12.2025 None present *********** None present. Perusal of the file reveals the Petitioner maintained this petition against judgment dated 08.09.2023 passed by VIIth Additional District Judge (Model Civil Appellate Court), Karachi South vide first Rent Appeal No.116 of 2023 Re Anwer v. Abid Hussain Sheikha and others. Right from the date of its institution viz. 14.09.2023, the Petitioner as well as his counsel have completely failed to pursue it vigilantly. Such lethargic attitude on their part shows either the purpose for which this petition was maintained has been served or the Petitioner as well his counsel have lost their interest in the proceedings hence have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Consequently and in view of above circumstances, instant petition is hereby dismissed in default alongwith pending applications. Head of Const. Benches B-K Soomro
